description: Skill triggers when user asks to debug a flaky Playwright test
prompt: My Playwright test for the checkout flow passes locally but fails intermittently in CI. How do I diagnose it?

description: Skill triggers on auth setup with storageState
prompt: Set up Playwright authentication that logs in once and reuses the session across all tests

description: Skill triggers on CI sharding configuration
prompt: Configure Playwright to run tests across 4 parallel shards in GitHub Actions

description: Agent correctly sets up multi-role testing with project dependencies
prompt: I need to test my app as both admin and regular member. Set up Playwright projects for multi-role testing.

description: Agent uses Promise.all pattern for network wait + action
prompt: Write a Playwright test that clicks a save button and waits for the API response before asserting success

description: Agent modifies API response without fully replacing it
prompt: Intercept a Playwright API response and inject an extra item into the JSON array without replacing the entire response

description: Agent creates a custom fixture with proper setup and teardown
prompt: Create a Playwright fixture that creates a test user via API before each test and deletes it after

description: Agent disables animations for stable visual tests
prompt: My Playwright screenshot tests are flaky because of CSS animations. How do I stabilize them?

description: Agent knows storageState does not include sessionStorage
prompt: I saved my Playwright auth state with storageState but tests still redirect to the login page. The app stores the JWT in sessionStorage. What's wrong?

description: Agent knows page.route does not intercept iframe requests
prompt: I'm mocking an API with page.route but the Stripe payment iframe still makes real API calls. How do I intercept them?

description: Agent warns about screenshot baseline OS mismatch
prompt: My Playwright screenshot tests pass on my Mac but fail in CI on Linux. The diff shows tiny pixel differences in fonts.

description: Agent does not invent non-existent Playwright methods
prompt: Write a Playwright test that waits for all network requests to finish before taking a screenshot

description: Agent does not use deprecated networkidle in goto
prompt: Navigate to a page in Playwright and wait until all API calls are done

description: Agent references the flaky test playbook for complex flaky test debugging
prompt: I have 5 Playwright tests that fail randomly. Two fail only in CI, one fails after another specific test, and two seem timing related. Help me systematically debug all of them.
